title: micromeles alnifolia var. tiliifolia
intro: Micromeles alnifolia var. tiliifolia, also known as the Korean meadowsweet or Korean hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub native to Korea and Japan, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible berries. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Micromeles alnifolia var. tiliifolia include the potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are traditionally used to support overall well-being and promote digestive health.
